title: Robonet prompt to quant execution on Hyperliquid
summary_title: How AI agents are democratizing algorithmic trading on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Robonet founders demo AI-powered strategy building, backtesting, and live deployment with real 488% returns.

key_moments.label: Space opens with hosts testing audio and casual banter about X's new cash tags
Introductions: Zerk from Wreck Gang introduces guests Augustus and Mike from Robonet and Elora
Mike explains Elora's predictive AI network: 52-53% directional accuracy, forecasting future prices
Augustus describes Robonet's evolution from token yield to intent-based automated strategy platform
Mike shares real example: deployed AI strategy earning 488% backtest returns on ETH using SMA crossovers
Augustus details security: private key management via Brevi, locked code execution, emergency stop controls
Roadmap discussion: multi-asset support, oil/metals trading, funding rate arbitrage across venues
Closing remarks: hosts thank Robonet team, discuss future where AI agents trade autonomously
